about.title: Umrah, a unique journey
about.subtitle: We accompany you on one of the most important journeys of your life.
about.p1: Umrah is the minor Islamic pilgrimage, performable at any time of year. Unlike Hajj, it is not obligatory but is a deeply recommended act of worship.
about.p2: Our agency guides you step by step: visa, accommodation near the Holy Sites, spiritual guidance, and 24/7 assistance. Your peace of mind is our priority.

offers.subtitle: Same core package, same guidance. The difference: your accommodation tier.

faq.title: Everything you need to know
faq.subtitle: Clear answers to your most common questions.
faq.a1: Any Muslim, man or woman, who is in good physical health and financially capable, can perform Umrah at any time of year. There is no age limit, but parental consent is required for minors.
faq.a2: We handle the entire Saudi Arabian visa process on your behalf. You simply need to provide us with your valid passport (at least 6 months remaining), passport photos, and proof of address.
faq.a3: A meningitis vaccination certificate is mandatory. It is also recommended to get vaccinated against influenza. You will need to provide a medical certificate upon registration.
faq.a4: Umrah can be performed at any time of year, except during the days of Hajj. We offer departures throughout the year with pre-set dates.
faq.a5: A 30% deposit is required at registration. The balance must be paid no later than 45 days before departure. Interest-free installment payment in 3 instalments is available.
faq.a6: The baggage allowance depends on the airline used. Generally, it is 23 kg checked baggage and 7 kg cabin baggage. We will provide exact details upon confirmation of your booking.
